item.title: 2025 Retail Holiday Threat Report: Scams and Impersonation Attacks Targeting Retailers - BforeAI
item.description: Report on 2025 retail holiday scams, detailing malicious domain trends, brand impersonation, crypto, travel fraud, and recommendations for organizations and consumers.

item.title: Threat Research Report: Elon vs. Trump Feud Drives Malicious Domain Surge - BforeAI
item.description: Threat actors are attempting to capitalize on the public trade policy feud between Elon Musk and Donald Trump to register and weaponize a broad array of malicious domains.

item.title: Threat Research Report: Malicious Activity Surrounding Perplexity's Comet Browser Launch - BforeAI
item.description: This report details fraudulent activities targeting Perplexity's Comet AI browser, including domain squatting, fake apps, and malvertising campaigns.

item.title: H-1B Domain Activity and U.S. Migration Trends Following Trump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee Announcement - BforeAI
item.description: A data-driven look at how Trump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa fee sparked a wave of fraudulent domain registrations and cyber scams. Explore patterns, motivations, and real-world risks behind this 2025 H-1B visa fraud surge with guidance for organizations and applicants.

item.title: Suspicious Domain Activity in Lead-up to 2026 FIFA World Cup Tournament - BforeAI
item.description: PreCrime Labs found 498 suspicious domains leading up to 2026 FIFA World Cup, exploiting themes like fake merchandise, streaming, and ticketing for the 2026 tournament.

item.title: Advisory: 2025 Texas Flooding Crisis Scams - BforeAI
item.description: PreCrime Labs' advisory on 2025 Texas flood crisis scams reveals a surge in opportunistic domain registrations exploiting fear, relief, and donations.

item.title: Threat Report: BEC in the Financial Services Sector - BforeAI
item.description: Combat BEC attacks in finance. Our report reveals Q1 2025 threats, from AI-generated domains to crypto scams. Stay safe with our mitigation strategies.

item.title: Financial Domain Spoofing Trends of 2024 - BforeAI
item.description: The US banking industry has seen a significant uptick in cyberattacks, particularly in phishing and spoofing, due to interconnectivity of banks and

item.title: Duolingo Mascot Death Scams Report - BforeAI
item.description: The popularity of Duo and the buzz around his death created an opportunity for cybercriminals to leverage the incident to level various related online scams.

item.title: 2024 Paris Olympic Games Infrastructure Attack Report - BforeAI
item.description: The Paris Olympic Games, which officially started on 26 July, 2024, has been swirling with malicious and cybercriminal activities for months before the event.

item.title: PreCrime Landscape Report Q2 2022 - BforeAI
item.description: The months of July, August, and September have shown increased recorded data breaches, phishing malware, and ransomware attacks. We have compile a report with everything you missed during Q1 & Q2 2022.

item.title: 2024 US Elections Infrastructure Attack Report - BforeAI
item.description: The US elections are set to be held on November 5, 2024, and there have been numerous global threats revolving around this significant event. Cybercriminals

item.title: Crowdstrike Attack Report - BforeAI
item.description: On July 19, 2024, a sudden outage affected a majority of primarily Microsoft devices following an update issued by CrowdStrike. Initial inability to identify

item.title: International Pizza Chain Domain Spoofing Report - BforeAI
item.description: BforeAI researchers uncovered a sophisticated phishing campaign targeting well-known international pizza restaurant chains, resulting in financial losses. The

item.title: Imported Risk: Cybercriminals Exploit Tariff Uncertainty - BforeAI
item.description: Tariff exploitation scams surge as cybercriminals exploit uncertainty with phishing and misinformation. Get details on threat tactics and domain registrations.

item.title: Commercial Airline Industry Sees Sustained Scam and Impersonation Activity in 2026 - BforeAI
item.description: 2026 Commercial Airline Threat Report: Uncover sustained security threats. Details on 11,600+ malicious domains, key phishing tactics, crypto abuse, and vital brand protection strategies.

item.title: Bybit Opportunists: Malicious Infrastructure Attacks Report - BforeAI
item.description: BforeAI threat research team collected 596 suspicious domains originating from at least 13 different countries in the three weeks following the Bybit breach.

item.title: Malicious Infrastructure Campaigns: How Unrest in Iran is Being Weaponized Online - BforeAI
item.description: PreCrime Labs analyzes a surge of Iran-themed domain registrations weaponizing unrest for fraud, sanctions evasion, and conflict. Get preemptive security indicators.

item.title: PreCrime Landscape Report Q4 2022 - BforeAI
item.description: The months of October, November, and December 2022 have seen increased numbers of data breaches, phishing, and ransomware attacks. Trends on the rise the past quarter include virtual kidnapping scams, SEO poisoning, business email compromise attacks now targeting physical goals, and an increase in supply chain attacks and malvertising. Read the full report to learn more!

item.title: 2024 Online Retail Threat Report - BforeAI
item.description: The retail industry has seen tremendous growth in the past few years with every business establishing its online presence. However, the access to a vast

item.title: Phishing Campaign Imitating U.S. Department of Education (G5) - BforeAI
item.description: PreCrime™ Labs, the threat research team at BforeAI, has identifies a phishing campaign currently targeting the U.S. Department of Education’s G5 portal, which is used for managing grants and federal education funding.

item.title: Luxury Fashion Brands Face New Wave of Threats in Lead-up to 2025 Holiday Shopping Season - BforeAI
item.description: Luxury fashion brands face new cyber threats, including impersonation scams and phishing, in the lead-up to the 2025 holiday shopping season.

item.title: Malicious Telegram APK Campaign Advisory - BforeAI
item.description: PreCrime™ Labs has identified a large malicious campaign of 607 domains actively distributing application files (“APKs”), claiming to be Telegram Messenger. Read more.

item.title: Tax Scams Alert: Seasonal IRS Issues and Risks
item.description: Tax season isn’t just busy for taxpayers, it’s also a prime time for scammers. Explore real examples of tax-related fraud and how to spot them before it’s too late.

item.title: 2024 Online Holiday Retail Threat Report - BforeAI
item.description: BforeAI researchers analyzed approximately 6000 retail industry domains registered in the last 90 days to uncover significant trends in the threat landscape.

item.title: Romance Scams Proliferate Domain Registrations Ahead of Valentine’s Day - BforeAI
item.description: Analysis of 3280+ suspicious 'love/dating' domains registered before Valentine's Day for romance scams, crypto fraud, and dating app credential harvesting.

item.title: Malicious Domain Activity During LA Wildfires – BforeAI
item.description: Explore BforeAI threat report on phishing & scam domains exploiting the 2025 Los Angeles wildfires, uncovering patterns, risks & mitigation insights.

item.title: Threat Advisory: Scam Activity Leveraging U.S. Actions in Venezuela in January 2026 - BforeAI
item.description: Threat advisory on scam campaigns exploiting U.S. actions in Venezuela, with malicious domains targeting merchandise, crypto, energy, and real estate.

item.title: Threat Research Advisory: Mass Fake-Shop Campaign Targeting Retail Customers - BforeAI
item.description: PreCrime Labs' 2025 advisory details a mass fake-shop campaign leveraging 244 domains, Chinese infrastructure, and retail brand mimicry to facilitate fraud and malware.

item.title: Reports - BforeAI
item.description: Explore our latest PreCrime Labs reports for in-depth analyses, data-driven insights, and timely research that help you stay ahead of key trends and developments in predictive security.
